tools.name: findEmail
tools.description: Find a verified email address for a contact at a domain

tools.name: findEmailBatchSubmit
tools.description: Submit a bulk find-email batch

tools.name: findEmailBatchGet
tools.description: Poll a bulk find-email batch

tools.name: signals-funding
tools.description: Research a company's most recent funding round and public/IPO status by domain. Returns a structured funding summary with investors and source URLs.

tools.name: signals-mna
tools.description: Research a company's recent M&A activity by domain — whether it was acquired or made acquisitions, with counterparty, deal status, and value.

tools.name: signals-tech
tools.description: Detect the ERP or CRM system(s) a company uses, or verify a specific technology, by domain — verified with public web evidence, not vendor data alone.

tools.name: signals-open_jobs
tools.description: Summarise a company's current hiring from public job postings by domain — total openings, example titles, function areas, technologies, and locations.

tools.name: signals-firmographics
tools.description: Return a company's firmographic profile (headcount, size, type, founded, HQ) plus a Saber-derived refined category and sell-to segments, with cited evidence.

tools.name: company_signals-list
tools.description: List company signal runs with optional filters for domain, company ID, completion date, status, and subscription.

tools.name: company_signals-create
tools.description: Create a company research signal, return immediately, then poll the signal ID or receive results through a webhook.

tools.name: company_signals-create_batch
tools.description: Create many company signals across domains, questions, or templates. Use templates for larger standardized batches.

tools.name: contacts-list_signals
tools.description: List contact signal runs with optional filters for profile URL and pagination.

tools.name: contacts-create_signal
tools.description: Create a contact research signal, return immediately, then poll the signal ID or receive results through a webhook.

tools.name: company_signals-get
tools.description: Retrieve the current status and AI-generated answer for a company signal when it has completed.

tools.name: company_signals-subscription_logs
tools.description: List company signal executions produced by a specific signal subscription, with filters and pagination.

tools.name: contacts-get_signal
tools.description: Retrieve the current status and AI-generated answer for a contact signal when it has completed.

tools.name: getContactResearchByExternalID
tools.description: Retrieve contact research using an external system ID, such as a HubSpot contact ID, plus the source name.

tools.name: contacts-create_research
tools.description: Start asynchronous AI research for a contact using LinkedIn and other sources, then poll the research ID for results.

tools.name: contacts-get_research
tools.description: Retrieve the current status and AI-generated insights for a contact research job when it has completed.

tools.name: contacts-search
tools.description: Search for contacts by company, name, job title, keyword, country, department, or seniority using the API key owner's Sales Navigator connection.

tools.name: contact_lists-list
tools.description: List saved contact lists with pagination.

tools.name: contact_lists-create
tools.description: Run a LinkedIn Sales Navigator search, store a point-in-time contact snapshot, and return contact list metadata.

tools.name: contact_lists-get
tools.description: Retrieve contact list metadata and the stored contact count.

tools.name: contact_lists-update
tools.description: Rename a saved contact list without changing its stored contact snapshot.

tools.name: contact_lists-delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a contact list and its stored contact snapshots.

tools.name: contact_lists-get_contacts
tools.description: Page through contacts stored in a saved list without making a new Sales Navigator request.

tools.description: Update a signal template by creating a new version while preserving the template ID. Omitted fields keep their previous values.

tools.name: signal_templates-delete
tools.description: Soft-delete a signal template so it is no longer active while preserving it for historical tracking.

tools.description: List all signal subscriptions for your organization

tools.description: List all AI-generated signal summaries for a domain, ordered by creation date (latest first)

tools.description: Generate an AI summary consolidating insights from all completed company signals for a domain

tools.description: Page through companies that match a saved company list filter.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: contacts-list_signals, company_lists-create · Private data: findEmail, contacts-list_signals, contacts-create_signal, contacts-get_signal, getContactResearchByExternalID, contacts-create_research, contacts-get_research, contacts-search, contact_lists-list, contact_lists-create, contact_lists-get, contact_lists-update, contact_lists-delete, contact_lists-get_contacts · Public sink: findEmail, findEmailBatchSubmit, findEmailBatchGet, company_signals-create, contacts-create_signal · Destructive: contact_lists-create, contact_lists-delete, signal_templates-delete, signal_subscriptions-trigger, subscription_actions-delete, market_signals-delete_subscription, market_signals-trigger_subscription, company_lists-delete, scoring-profile-delete, scoring-rule-delete, scoring-assignment-delete.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: contacts-list_signals, company_lists-create · Private data: findEmail, contacts-list_signals, contacts-create_signal, contacts-get_signal, getContactResearchByExternalID, contacts-create_research, contacts-get_research, contacts-search, contact_lists-list, contact_lists-create, contact_lists-get, contact_lists-update, contact_lists-delete, contact_lists-get_contacts · Public sink: findEmail, findEmailBatchSubmit, findEmailBatchGet, company_signals-create, contacts-create_signal · Destructive: contact_lists-create, contact_lists-delete, signal_templates-delete, signal_subscriptions-trigger, subscription_actions-delete, market_signals-delete_subscription, market_signals-trigger_subscription, company_lists-delete, scoring-profile-delete, scoring-rule-delete, scoring-assignment-delete

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
